nasb.text: You will drink it and drain it. Then you will gnaw its fragments And tear your breasts; for I have spoken,’ declares the Lord God.

esv.text: you shall drink it and drain it out, and gnaw its shards, and tear your breasts; for I have spoken, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 你要喝這杯，並且喝盡； 然後把這杯摔成碎塊， 又抓傷自己的胸。 因為這是我曾說過的。’這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 你必一滴不剩把它喝光， 然后把杯摔成碎片， 抓破自己的胸脯。 这是主耶和华说的。’
